% fig_lec03_chart_single.tex — A single chart (ψ_α : O_α → U_α) on a wavy surface
% Data: generated by scripts/sim_lec03_charts.jl
%
% M = graph of z = 0.5·cos(0.9·x) + 0.35·sin(0.6·y) over [-3,3]²
% U_α ⊂ R² : rotated ellipse; O_α = graph over U_α.
% ψ_α : O_α → U_α is the vertical projection (x,y,z) ↦ (x,y).

\begin{center}
\begin{tikzpicture}
  % Monochromatic colormap for the O_α surface patch (cgblue tint)
  \pgfplotsset{
    colormap={cgbluetint}{rgb255(0cm)=(210,224,240) rgb255(1cm)=(112,156,200)},
  }

  % ── LEFT: M (3D surface with O_α highlighted) ──────────────
  \begin{axis}[
      name=M,
      width=7.8cm, height=5.8cm,
      view={-28}{35},
      xmin=-3, xmax=3, ymin=-3, ymax=3, zmin=-1.1, zmax=1.1,
      axis lines=none,
      xtick=\empty, ytick=\empty, ztick=\empty,
      clip=false,
  ]
    % Base surface (faint)
    \addplot3[
        surf, opacity=0.30, shader=interp,
        colormap name=grsurface, mesh/rows=55, forget plot,
    ] table {data/lec03_charts_surface.dat};

    % O_α patch on M (cgblue-tinted overlay)
    \addplot3[
        surf, opacity=0.55, shader=interp,
        colormap name=cgbluetint, mesh/rows=18, forget plot,
    ] table {data/lec03_charts_Oalpha_patch.dat};

    % Point p on M
    \addplot3[only marks, mark=*, mark size=1.6pt, banana!90!black, forget plot]
        table {data/lec03_charts_point_p_M.dat};

    % Labels inside axis (axis coordinates)
    \node[font=\sf\small, text=spacecadet]
        at (axis cs:-2.4,-2.8,1.0) {$\M$};
    \node[font=\small, text=cgblue]
        at (axis cs:0.25,0.6,0.8) {$O_\alpha$};
    \node[font=\small, text=banana!60!black]
        at (axis cs:1.25,-0.05,0.35) {$p$};
  \end{axis}

  % ── RIGHT: U_α ⊂ R² ────────────────────────────────────────
  \begin{axis}[
      name=Ualpha,
      at={($(M.east)+(2.2cm,0)$)}, anchor=west,
      width=5.0cm, height=5.0cm,
      axis lines=middle,
      axis line style={birrenorange, line width=0.6pt,
                       -{Stealth[length=5pt,width=3pt]}},
      xmin=-1.4, xmax=2.6, ymin=-1.1, ymax=1.8,
      xtick=\empty, ytick=\empty,
      xlabel={}, ylabel={},
      clip=false,
  ]
    % U_α : filled ellipse (no border)
    \addplot[fill=cgblue!15, draw=none, forget plot]
        table {data/lec03_charts_Ualpha_boundary.dat} \closedcycle;

    % ψ_α(p)
    \addplot[only marks, mark=*, mark size=1.6pt, banana!90!black, forget plot]
        table {data/lec03_charts_point_p_alpha.dat};

    \node[font=\sf\small, text=birrenorange]
        at (axis cs:2.4,1.6) {$\Rn{2}$};
    \node[font=\small, text=cgblue]
        at (axis cs:0.5,0.3) {$U_\alpha$};
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=banana!60!black, anchor=north]
        at (axis cs:0.95,-0.12) {$\psi_\alpha(p)$};
  \end{axis}

  % ── Arrow ψ_α between the two panels ───────────────────────
  \draw[thick, -{Stealth[length=7pt,width=4pt]}, munsell]
    ($(M.east)+(0.05,0.15)$) -- ($(Ualpha.west)+(-0.05,0.15)$)
    node[midway, above, font=\small, text=munsell]{$\psi_\alpha$};
\end{tikzpicture}
\end{center}
